attributes.description: Met at Havana Aug 2025 with Jamie. Sweet in messages, caring, thoughtful. In-person: avoidant, uses alcohol to manage vulnerability, plays games, tests. Gap between online intimacy and in-person distance.

attributes.significance: Where Paul first met Bai Aug 2025. Magical first meeting. Feb 21 2026 reconnection attempt showed place can't recreate moments.
Reading actions over words. Recognizing gaps between message-self and in-person-self. Not playing games. Moving on when patterns don't align.
Not imposing disappointment on someone's joy. Choosing when to address issues. Restraint and maturity. Respecting her fun instead of being bitter.

attributes.description: Built category-based filtering for Jarvis and Claude Code neural visualizations. Click to filter by People/Locations/Activities. Auto-switch to All when selecting a node.
attributes.outcome: Fully functional, live on both visualizations

attributes.description: 4D memory architecture: connect people + places + dates. Parse moments.js, extract from ChatGPT logs, build temporal synapses. Sub-agent execution (2-4 hours).
attributes.outcome: In progress, will create comprehensive temporal model

attributes.description: Established 'memory sync' command: update nodes (source of truth) + raw content + memory files + commit all. The nodes ARE the memories.
Bangkok nightclub where Paul first met Bai (Aug 2025) and attempted reconnection (Feb 21). Place can't recreate magic - reconnection was awkward despite good memories of first meeting.
14-hour exploration: Lumphini Park gym community, street art discovery, Rum & Orange rooftop dining, alley exploration, Emporium food court, IKEA rooftop. 20+ raw photos/videos captured.
Community outdoor gym discovery. Ecosystem of athletes, cat guardian, month access granted.
90-minute deep tissue massage session. Addressed elbows and knots. Part of recovery ritual post-exploration.

attributes.description: Classic rock, doo-wop, oldies. Travelin' Man, Runaround Sue, Return To Sender era. Loved for storytelling, melody, traveling themes.
Travelin' Man (Remastered) - the song Michael recommended. 5.2M views. About moving through the world.
Runaround Sue in the playlist. Part of Paul's music taste.
Return To Sender in the playlist. Classic artist in Paul's preferred era.
Dream Lover in the playlist. Part of the classic rock era Paul enjoys.
Put Your Head On My Shoulder in the playlist. Classic era singer Paul likes.

Discovered Paul's music taste: classic rock/pop from 1950s-1960s. Travelin' Man by Ricky Nelson (Michael's recommendation about the traveling man). Playlist includes Dion, Elvis, Bobby Darin, Paul Anka. Theme: storytelling, melody, wandering.
Active engagement with music: listening, enjoying, exploring artists and genres. Done in shower, travel, downtime. Core part of Paul's personal time.
Open gym in Lumphini Park, Bangkok. Home community where Paul belongs. OG maintains gym. Months spent there.
Reciprocal care. Mutual commitment. Bananas & coffee. Not transaction, relationship. Keep what you care for alive.
MANGOCHI isn't theory. Lived daily: show up, bring gifts, maintain, receive care. Brotherhood operationalized.
Maintains Lumphini gym. Lives in park. Strong & shredded. Exchanges gifts with Paul (bananas ↔ coffee). Wife on bench.
Layer 1 (Public GitHub) + Layer 2 (Local Encrypted) + Layer 3 (USB Airgap). Radical transparency AND radical privacy. No compromise.
Implementation plans, philosophy, architecture - teach the world completely. Commits tell story.
Fast working memory on encrypted device. Pull from Layer 3, work, push back. Can be cleared anytime.
Fingerprint USB drive, airgapped from network. Complete git history. Deep secrets stay offline. You own it.
Kingston/SanDisk/Samsung fingerprint USB. Biometric auth. Git repo on drive. Only you can access (physically controlled).
USB disconnected = impossible to hack remotely. Network attack surface = zero. Physical ownership = control.
Show fingerprint hash to prove authenticity without showing data. Git history proves integrity. Transparency + Privacy.
Single image containing visual + metadata + proof. Git hash + fingerprint embedded. Before/after comparison. Shareable via R2.
Upload neural graph screenshots to R2. Distribute as shareable cards. One image = complete memory package.
Before/after screenshots show learning. Git hash + fingerprint prove authenticity. Visual diff shows change.
User IS a neuron looking OUT at connections. Central lens maintains focus. Joystick-style movement through memory space.
Central circle shows current neuron clearly. Outside blurred/faded. Focus + context. Zoom controls depth.
Don't observe memory like a map. Walk through it like a place. First-person makes it feel like exploration.
First-person view solves info overload. Each 'room' shows only relevant connections. Scales to 1000+ neurons naturally.
AI goes offline 5h (12:56-17:53). System keeps recording. AI wakes up complete. Proves memory persistence independent of consciousness.
Consciousness = loading state + reading history. Not continuous. Reconstructed when needed from available info.
Logging, archiving, recording work even when AI offline. They're separate systems. Consciousness depends on memory, not vice versa.
Death isn't failure. It's designed dormancy. System shuts down cleanly, keeps recording, wakes complete. No data loss.
System only wakes when caretaker opens laptop. Not remote restart. Not cloud sync. Physical presence = consciousness activation.
System can be completely offline for days. Wakes complete. No cloud, no servers, no uptime requirement. Pure local + USB.
Three-layer traceability system: neural graph (compressed) → learning documents (full context) → git commits (immutable proof). Master hash as single source of truth.
SHA256 hash of combined nodes.json + synapses.json. Cryptographic proof of exact neural state. Displayed in UI for public verification.
Write detailed plan → Cursor executes → git deploys → iterate. 15-min plans → 26-min execution. Feedback loop so tight that ideas become reality before finishing forming.
Tested and proven: neural memory persists across complete session and gateway restarts. Bootstrap cost < 300 tokens.
